prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to management fee limits for retirement leasehold accommodation in England, which is under the jurisdiction of the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government. It does not apply to Scotland, as housing policy is devolved to the Scottish Government.
